role: Entry point and user-facing interface for all command-line operations in the ArchSpine system.
responsibility: Provides command routing, help text, UI formatting, initialization, and repository configuration operations to manage the mirror system from the terminal.

children.role: CLI UI presentation utility for formatting command output, banner display, configuration value parsing, and text wrapping.
Entry point for all CLI subcommands, routing each command to its dedicated handler.
Configuration module defining types, constants, and a dynamic builder function for document language selection in a multilingual documentation system.
CLI help text renderer for the ArchSpine command-line interface.
Primary CLI entrypoint and command router for the ArchSpine semantic mirror system.
Core directory responsible for initializing and bootstrapping both the repository configuration and the runtime environment of an ArchSpine project.
CLI command adapter for repository artifact strategy operations
